# McpClient.ServerSupports method

Returns `true` if the server advertised the capability gating *check*.

```csharp
public bool ServerSupports(Func<ServerCapabilities, bool> check)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| check | A predicate over the discovered server capabilities. |

## Return Value

`true` when discovery has run and the predicate holds.
